# Grouped var/const decls split cleanly: matching specs move, siblings
# stay behind. Multi-name specs (`var a, b = …`) split name-by-name
# so sibling names keep their original types/values.
exec sflit -source big.go -sink small.go -regex '^Matched' -move
cmp small.go expected_small.go
cmp big.go expected_big.go

-- big.go --
package p

var (
	MatchedVar  = 10
	UntouchedA  = "stay"
	MatchedPair = 42
	UntouchedB  = true
)

const (
	MatchedConst   = 1
	UntouchedConst = 2
)
-- expected_big.go --
package p

var (
	UntouchedA = "stay"

	UntouchedB = true
)

const (
	UntouchedConst = 2
)
-- expected_small.go --
package p

var MatchedVar = 10
var MatchedPair = 42

const MatchedConst = 1
